mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_address(user_id, receiver_name, phone, province_id, province_name, city_id, city_name, district_id, district_name, detail, remark, is_default, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{phone}, #{provinceId}, #{provinceName}, #{cityId}, #{cityName}, #{districtId}, #{districtName}, #{detail}, #{remark}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, phone = #{phone}, province_id = #{provinceId}, province_name = #{provinceName}, city_id = #{cityId}, city_name = #{cityName}, district_id = #{districtId}, district_name = #{districtName}, detail = #{detail}, remark = #{remark}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = NOW() WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE shop_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE shop_address SET is_default = 1 WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
